# hetzner-robot_ip (Resource)

Manages an IP address's traffic-warning configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Configure traffic warnings for a single IP address.
resource "hetzner-robot_ip" "node" {
  ip               = "1.2.3.4"
  traffic_warnings = true
  traffic_hourly   = 200
  traffic_daily    = 2000
  traffic_monthly  = 20
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address

### Optional

- `traffic_daily` (Number) Daily traffic warning limit (MB)
- `traffic_hourly` (Number) Hourly traffic warning limit (MB)
- `traffic_monthly` (Number) Monthly traffic warning limit (GB)
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean) Enable traffic warnings

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `separate_mac` (String) Separate MAC, if set
- `server_ip` (String) Server IP the address belongs to
- `server_number` (Number) Server number
